text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the Takarazuka Kinen, Winning Ticket and I
spend some time thinking about what Biwa
Hayahide said.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
What is it about me now that's so different
compared to when I ran the Derby?
choice_data_list: Before the Derby, you had those scary dreams...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah, I remember that! It got me all scared!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But that makes sense, right? It was my big dream, to go to the Derby. I really couldn't stand the thought of losing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She couldn't stand... losing?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It seems like losing to me in that final struggle has
got her rather worked up.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Huh... Wouldn't scrimmages be more useful than
training on her own though?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I mean, the one we had just now was really great!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh? Was it?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. The last sprint between you and Taishin
was such a tough fight!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Everyone said it was a really intense race!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Did you think so too?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Even though you lost?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I didn't notice since Ticket is always so
earnest, but it's true that something important
has changed.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh, what's going on? What feeling?
choice_data_list:
The feeling you had when you couldn't bear the
thought of losing!

The feeling you had when you couldn't bear the
thought of losing!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's right... I couldn't stand the thought of it...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Maybe I'm seeing things wrong.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I thought all I wanted was more amazing races
like the Derby—running against my rivals, the
audience getting super into it...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I figured that would be enough to satisfy me.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So maybe I lost sight of the feeling I had back then—that I absolutely didn't wanna lose, that I had to win.
choice_data_list: But that feeling itself is what's really important.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh... Yeah, you're right.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: If "having an awesome race" is all that I try for, it's never really gonna be an awesome race.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I've gotta go for broke! Aim to win no matter what! 'Cause when everyone competes with everything they've got, that's when you get a race as fiery as the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Taishin and Hayahide put all their heart into
winning, and that's why they keep improving.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But I wasn't serious about getting first place... so I
wasn't a real rival to them at all!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I wanna win! I gotta beat Taishin and
Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
No... not just them. I wanna beat everyone! I can't
lose to anyone!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'll win every time and show the audience what a
real awesome race looks like!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: 'Cause I realize now...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's the dream I've been chasing all along!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her resolute declaration moves my heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Much like the very first time she told me about
the Derby and her dream.
choice_data_list: Then we might as well aim for the biggest race!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: The biggest?
choice_data_list:
The Grand Prix at the end of the year! The
Arima Kinen!

The Grand Prix at the end of the year! The
Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa, the Arima Kinen! So many famous
showdowns happened there!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'll become a legend once I win it! So it's
time to train!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But before that, I need to do one last important
thing. Hold on a sec!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I hurry after Winning Ticket as she dashes off.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin! Hayahide! Race against me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pass.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: No passing! The loser buys everyone juice!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ticket... If you simply want to have fun at
practice, now is not—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
No holding back! This is gonna be a serious
showdown between the three of us!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Pleeease! I'm begging you—I really gotta tell you
both something!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
History shows that she will not be denied. You
know that as well as I do.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Then it's on! Okay, get readyyy, GO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though they run in cheerful weather, under a
pleasant, blue sky...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The final hundred meters of the sudden race
spark a serious battle.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
(Both of them are really in the zone! They're so
fast!)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But don't count me out! I'm not gonna lose this
tiiime!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ticket! Huff... Failure is not an option for me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No, I'm gonna leave both of you behind!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Haaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket is the first to sprint forward, but
the others quickly kick into high gear and give
chase.

text_block_list.name: BNW
text_block_list.text: HAAAAHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Each unleashing every last ounce of their stamina,
the three racers bound across the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: It's... my... WIN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The racers drop down on their knees, too
exhausted to say anything for a moment.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you guys... I know I haven't been good
enough to be your rival.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Especially lately, but that's 'cause I forgot about
the most important thing.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Well, well...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That's why today I've gotta tell you exactly how I
really feel!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's hear it.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hayahide! You always know how to analyze the
whole race ahead! You're calm, but also
passionate, and I love that about you!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's why I don't wanna lose against you!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...I understand.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And Taishin! Your final sprints are so great it's
crazy! You're awesome, and a little scary, and I
love that about you!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So that's why I don't wanna lose against you
either!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...I know.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Both of you are my all-time favorites—my most respected rivals! And I really wanna beat you more than anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm entering the Arima Kinen, so will you please
race me there?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I want to have a real battle against you two, as
rivals!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the sight of Winning Ticket's earnest
expression, a fond smile widens across Biwa
Hayahide's face.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Rivals, hm? I know that look in your eyes well
enough.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: All right. I'll enter the Arima Kinen. It's a promise.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aww, H-Hayahideee!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I... have things I need to do.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
So I don't have time to be playing around with
you guys.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But a race against the two of you...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, I suppose it's worth making time for.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Th-then does that mean...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But if you put on a weak-sauce performance at
the Arima Kinen, I'll literally kick your butt.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: TAISHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Winning Ticket wraps her two friends in a big hug.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh! I-idiot, you're crushing me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
WAAAAH! Let's do everything we can to make
the Arima Kinen the greatest ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Winning Ticket's emotion-filled cry echoes
across the track, it's clear that the members of
BNW are rivals once more.
